LIST udef_lib
short udlib_vdih
 VDI handle provided to userdef library.
int udlib_garbage
 0 means no garbage needed; +1 means userdef lib have been loaded but maybe some of them remains unused so a garbage is needed; -1 means an userdef object has been freed and maybe the corresponding userdef lib need to be freed now

int APPprivate_struct::udlib_garbage
 

0 means no garbage needed; +1 means userdef lib have been loaded but maybe some of them remains unused so a garbage is needed; -1 means an userdef object has been freed and maybe the corresponding userdef lib need to be freed now
